mapper.sql: id, user_id, points_type_id, current_balance, total_earned, total_spent, frozen_points, last_update_time, create_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO u_user_points ( user_id, points_type_id, current_balance, total_earned, total_spent, frozen_points, last_update_time, create_time ) VALUES ( #{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pointsTypeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{currentBalance,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{totalEarned,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{totalSpent,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{frozenPoints,jdbcType=INTEGER}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM u_user_points WHERE user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY points_type_id ASC

SELECT
FROM u_user_points WHERE points_type_id = #{pointsTypeId,jdbcType=BIGINT} LIMIT 1
